title: Research Project Manifest
description: Schema for project.yaml — the manifest file that must exist before research rounds can begin.

project_id.description: Unique project identifier (e.g., 'my-project', 'cache-study'). Must be unique within the workspace.

target_standard.description: The target venue, standard, or benchmark the research aims to meet.

cs_area.description: Computer science area: systems, networking, security, database, PL/compiler, architecture, software engineering, AI infrastructure, distributed systems, HCI/CSCW.

repository.description: Optional repository URL for the project.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this schema. Used by migration tooling to determine upgrade paths.
